# oucru

Collection of helper and miscellaneous functions used for and by the
Oxford University Clinical Research Unit (OUCRU), Vietnam

## Installation

You can install the development version of oucru from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("OUCRU-Modelling/oucru")
```

## Example

### OUCRU colors and palette

Basic example for using OUCRU color palette for `ggplot2`

``` r
library(ggplot2)
library(oucru)

p <- ggplot(mpg, aes(hwy, class, fill = drv)) +
  geom_violin(show.legend = FALSE)

# typical figure with viridis colors
p +
  scale_fill_viridis_d() +
  ggtitle("Using viridis colors")
```

![](reference/figures/README-ggplot-examples-1.png)

``` r

# use OUCRU main color palette
p +
  scale_fill_oucru_d(palette = "main") +
  ggtitle("Using OUCRU colors")
```

![](reference/figures/README-ggplot-examples-2.png)

# Package index

## OUCRU themes and colors

Functions related to OUCRU official brand guideline themes and colors

### `ggplot2` scales

Functions for `ggplot2` scales coloring

- [`scale_fill_oucru_c()`](https://oucru-modelling.github.io/oucru/reference/ggplot_scales.md)
  [`scale_color_oucru_c()`](https://oucru-modelling.github.io/oucru/reference/ggplot_scales.md)
  [`scale_colour_oucru_c()`](https://oucru-modelling.github.io/oucru/reference/ggplot_scales.md)
  [`scale_fill_oucru_d()`](https://oucru-modelling.github.io/oucru/reference/ggplot_scales.md)
  [`scale_color_oucru_d()`](https://oucru-modelling.github.io/oucru/reference/ggplot_scales.md)
  [`scale_colour_oucru_d()`](https://oucru-modelling.github.io/oucru/reference/ggplot_scales.md)
  :

  OUCRU colors for `ggplot2` scales

### Miscellanous color functions

- [`oucru_color()`](https://oucru-modelling.github.io/oucru/reference/oucru_cols_and_pal.md)
  [`oucru_palette()`](https://oucru-modelling.github.io/oucru/reference/oucru_cols_and_pal.md)
  [`oucru_list_pals()`](https://oucru-modelling.github.io/oucru/reference/oucru_cols_and_pal.md)
  : Functions to fetch OUCRU colors and palettes based on the brand
  guideline
